name: Meme Face Tree
description: A sapling-tier Meme Tree, one of 100. A startled face crowned with a canopy of grinning ones - the forest is watching, and it thinks you should plant one. 100% of the $5 mint became permanent WATER backing in the Water vault. Every harvest, half its yield grows the tree and half buys Meme for Trees for whoever owns it. The backing is permanent and can never be withdrawn - this is an art purchase with a living yield feature, not a deposit. Rewards are yield-funded meme token drops; their value varies with the market and nothing is guaranteed.
